resources.string: Local lossless playback and Android 14+ USB format verification
Ordinary FLAC/ALAC playback uses Media3. Exact PCM/WAV USB mode writes directly to a separately verified AudioTrack and bypasses RootlessZachDSP processing.
Playing ordinary lossless route at unity player volume
Playing verified exact PCM through the selected USB AudioTrack
Playback completed; preferred USB mixer attributes were cleared
Format is not verified as lossless
Use exact verified USB mode for eligible PCM/WAV
Choose and inspect a source first.
Lossless playback is available, but compressed FLAC/ALAC is not called bit-perfect until decoded PCM output is independently verified.
This source exposes known PCM. Connect a compatible external USB DAC and enable exact mode to negotiate the public Android bit-perfect mixer.
%1$s. Playback uses the same exact AudioTrack that was checked against the active mixer preference. External DAC/loopback validation is still required.
No authorized MQA decoder is installed, and Android exposes no standardized trusted carrier flag. No unfold or rendering is claimed.
